title: Automotive Engineers
description: Develop new or improved designs for vehicle structural members, engines, transmissions, or other vehicle systems, using computer-assisted design technology. Direct building, modification, or testing of vehicle or components.

tasks.text: Conduct or direct system-level automotive testing.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide technical direction to other engineers or engineering support personnel.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform failure, variation, or root cause analyses.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Calibrate vehicle systems, including control algorithms or other software systems.
tasks.rationale: Software coding, programming, or application development task highly susceptible to automated generation.

tasks.text: Design or analyze automobile systems in areas such as aerodynamics, alternate fuels, ergonomics, hybrid power, brakes, transmissions, steering, calibration, safety, or diagnostics.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare or present technical or project status reports.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct research studies to develop new concepts in the field of automotive engineering.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Establish production or quality control standards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Alter or modify designs to obtain specified functional or operational performance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Research or implement green automotive technologies involving alternative fuels, electric or hybrid cars, or lighter or more fuel-efficient vehicles.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop calibration methodologies, test methodologies, or tools.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Create design alternatives for vehicle components, such as camless or dual-clutch engines or alternative air-conditioning systems, to increase fuel efficiency.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop or implement operating methods or procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop engineering specifications or cost estimates for automotive design concepts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct automotive design reviews.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design vehicles that use lighter materials, such as aluminum, magnesium alloy, or plastic, to improve fuel efficiency.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Write, review, or maintain engineering documentation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Develop specifications for vehicles powered by alternative fuels or alternative power methods.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Build models for algorithm or control feature verification testing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Coordinate production activities with other functional units, such as procurement, maintenance, or quality control.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design control systems or algorithms for purposes such as automotive energy management, emissions management, or increased operational safety or performance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop or integrate control feature requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Research computerized automotive applications, such as telemetrics, intelligent transportation systems, artificial intelligence, or automatic control.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read current literature, attend meetings or conferences, or talk with colleagues to stay abreast of new automotive technology or competitive products.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design vehicles for increased recyclability or use of natural, renewable, or recycled materials in vehicle construction.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
